title: ASUS ROG Strix SCAR 18 (2026) G835 Intel Core Ultra 9 290HX 32GB 2TB SSD NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5080 18" Windows 11 Home Gaming Laptop
description: The ASUS ROG Strix SCAR 18 (2026) G835 is a high-performance gaming laptop designed for serious gamers and creative professionals. Equipped with an Intel Core Ultra 9 290HX processor that features 24 cores and boost speeds of up to 5.5 GHz, this laptop offers exceptional processing power, ideal for demanding applications and multitasking. Coupled with a stunning 18-inch Mini LED display at a resolution of 3840 x 2400, it delivers vibrant visuals that enhance your gaming and viewing experience. This model distinguishes itself in the gaming market with its power and dedicated gaming features, including a robust NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5080 graphics card with 16GB of GDDR7 memory. Unlike many other gaming laptops, the SCAR 18 prioritises not just raw power, but also visual fidelity and responsiveness, making it an excellent choice for both gamers and content creators who require top-tier performance. Able to handle everything from intensive gaming sessions to creative video editing, the SCAR 18 comes with 32GB of DDR5 RAM and 2TB of SSD storage, making it highly capable of managing large files and running multiple applications seamlessly. Its suite of connectivity options, including HDMI, USB-C, and Wi-Fi 7, ensures you're well-equipped for all your gaming and multimedia needs. However, its performance and size may not make it the best choice for those seeking a lightweight, highly portable option for casual use or everyday tasks. What Makes It Different? The ASUS ROG Strix SCAR 18 sets itself apart from many other gaming laptops with its balance of high-end specifications and focused design for gaming at a professional level. While many laptops may offer moderate gaming performance, the SCAR 18 positions itself for users who demand more in terms of graphics capability and processing power, making it perfect for both gamers and creators alike. In contrast to entry-level models, which may suffice for casual gaming or office tasks, the SCAR 18's advanced hardware allows for an immersive gaming experience at high settings while also streamlining workflows for graphics-intensive applications, thus catering specifically to enthusiasts and professionals aiming for peak performance. Performance & Everyday Use The heart of the ASUS ROG Strix SCAR 18 is its Intel Core Ultra 9 290HX processor, which provides extraordinary computing power. With 24 cores, this laptop can effortlessly handle tasks that require significant processing resources, such as video rendering, 3D modelling, and competitive gaming, thereby enhancing your productivity and gaming capabilities. The ample 32GB of DDR5 RAM ensures smooth multitasking, with enough memory to run multiple applications or browser tabs simultaneously without any slowdown. This benefit is particularly valuable for gamers who enjoy streaming or for professionals who juggle intensive applications whilst working on projects. Storage is another strong point with a large 2TB SSD, offering quick access to your games, media, and work files. The fast read/write speeds of an SSD also contribute to faster boot times and quicker load times for your applications and games, offering a seamless user experience. However, while this laptop excels in performance, its weight and size may limit its portability for users who need an everyday machine for light tasks or commuting. Why Choose This ASUS ROG Strix SCAR 18? If you're a serious gamer or a creative professional seeking cutting-edge performance and visuals, the ASUS ROG Strix SCAR 18 is an excellent choice. High-performance 24-core processor for demanding tasks and gaming. Stunning Mini LED display for vibrant visuals at high resolutions. Generous 2TB SSD storage for quick file access and ample space. 16GB dedicated graphics memory for advanced gaming and creative applications. However, if you only need a laptop for basic tasks, a more budget-friendly option might be suitable. Consider a lighter, more portable laptop for everyday use or casual browsing. If you primarily need a machine for office applications, lower specs may suffice. For gaming at lower settings and resolutions, less robust models can be more cost-effective. Entry-level options are available for users focused only on basic functionalities. Great For The ASUS ROG Strix SCAR 18 is ideally suited for dedicated gamers, content creators, and professionals who require high performance for demanding software and gaming applications. Its powerful specs make it perfect for those who engage in graphics-intensive activities and need a reliable device that can handle the latest games or professional design work with ease. Gaming at high settings with an engaging visual experience. Creating high-resolution content such as video editing and 3D modelling. Multitasking with multiple demanding applications open simultaneously. Being at the forefront of next-gen connectivity and features.
